name: frontmatter-filter
description: Mirror a markdown tree to a target directory using strict frontmatter visibility rules.

scripts.test:integration:local: npm run build && npm run prepare-fixture && node --import tsx --test tests/integration/local/*.test.ts
scripts.test:live:publish-smoke: npm run build && npm run prepare-fixture && node --import tsx --test tests/live/publish-smoke.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live: npm run build && npm run prepare-fixture && node --import tsx --test tests/e2e/live.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration:local
